body:
Here are **well-reviewed local garage door companies serving Pleasanton, CA** that specifically handle **hardware replacement (springs, rollers, cables, tracks, openers, brackets, etc.)** and related repair work. I’ve focused on companies that are local, responsive, and commonly used in the Tri-Valley area.

* * *

4.4•Garage Door Services•Open

Website•Directions•(408) 916-5420

One of the most reliable options in the area for **same-day hardware replacement**.

  * Specializes in: springs, cables, rollers, tracks, openers

  * Known for: fully stocked service trucks (often fixes in one visit)

  * Availability: evenings & weekends

  * Good for: emergency repairs and full hardware rebuilds  
[Garage Door Repair in Pleasanton, CA | Precision Garage Doors](https://precisiondooreastbay.com/pleasanton?utm_source=chatgpt.com)

## 🧰 Quick recommendation (based on need)

  * **Fastest emergency hardware repair:** Valiant Garage Door, Precision Garage Door

  * **Most balanced (price + reliability):** Ace’s Garage Door, Silver Door Specialists

  * **Broader system replacement / older doors:** The Door Doctor

  * **24/7 availability:** Lions Garage Door Repair

* * *

## 💡 Tip for hardware replacement jobs

When you call, ask specifically:

  * “Do you stock torsion springs for my door size?”

  * “Can you replace rollers, cables, and bearings in one visit?”

  * “Is the service call fee applied to repair cost?”

Companies with fully stocked trucks (like Precision and Ace’s) usually complete everything in one trip, which saves the most money.

* * *

If you want, I can narrow this down to **the cheapest options** , **highest-rated by reviews** , or **companies that specialize specifically in springs vs opener hardware**.
